coverage_note: The bundled BDNF population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from BDNF neurotrophin signaling, TrkB activation, synaptic plasticity, dendritic remodeling, and activity-dependent neuronal survival and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000176697: BDNF coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: BDNF findings should be read against neurotrophin signaling, TrkB activation, synaptic plasticity, dendritic remodeling, and activity-dependent neuronal survival; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs6265 (BDNF Val66Met) is curated as a BDNF marker for Synaptic plasticity and learning/memory research, Mood, stress, and neuropsychiatric association context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
